CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-23-2026 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-07-2026 Set For Case Management Conference On Mar-11-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT .
Off Calendar Dec-09-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (by Zoom):
William Bellor-Yeh, Esq. 209-279-5658 for Plaintiff.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested/Discussed. Counsel states parties have reached a settlement yesterday. Counsel requests to continue the matter to February 2026 while waiting for the stipulation to be signed. The Court denies the request; Counsel failed to follow procedure and CCP, did not contest and request an appearance today, failed to contact the department to take the matter off-calendar. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT .

Plaintiff's unopposed motion for summary judgment is granted. Plaintiff shall submit a form of order granting the motion for summary judgment and a proposed judgment and must drop hard courtesy copies in Dept. 302's inbox.
Visiting Judge: Cindee Mayfield, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/CM)
